title: Barem cham bai Area Operations Manager

criteria.name: Phan tich hien trang van hanh
criteria.description: Danh gia kha nang nhan dien van de goc, doc du lieu va mo ta hien trang.

criteria.name: Chat luong giai phap
criteria.description: Danh gia tinh logic, tinh kha thi, muc do uu tien va su phu hop voi boi canh khu vuc.

criteria.name: Ke hoach trien khai
criteria.description: Danh gia kha nang chia giai doan, gan owner, timeline, KPI va co che giam sat.

criteria.name: Quan tri con nguoi va phoi hop phong ban
criteria.description: Danh gia cach quan ly doi ngu, xu ly khang cu va phoi hop da phong ban.

criteria.name: Tu duy tai chinh va tac dong kinh doanh
criteria.description: Danh gia kha nang lien ket giai phap voi chi phi, doanh thu, loi nhuan va rui ro.
